overall.description: A first-person perspective walk through a stormy wilderness at night, rendered in high-quality game engine graphics. The camera moves steadily along a grassy mountainside path beside a large rock cliff during heavy rain and dense fog, creating an atmospheric, tense environment.

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously along the stormy mountain path with the cliff wall visible to the right

entered.detail: large dark rock formation running along the right side of the path
dark stormy sky with heavy rain and fog obscuring the horizon
narrow dirt and grass trail winding along the mountainside
low bushes and grass scattered on the left slope

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark, stormy night in a wilderness area. The camera moves forward along a grassy mountainside trail with a large rock cliff wall visible to the right and scrub vegetation on the left. Heavy rain falls through foggy air, with limited visibility into the storm-darkened distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cliffside path pressed against rock wall

events.description: path narrows and camera moves closer to the rock cliff wall on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the narrowing trail pressed close against the rock wall in the heavy storm

segments.scene_description: The path narrows as the camera moves closer to the rock cliff wall, which now dominates the right side of the frame. The scrub vegetation on the left falls behind as the trail becomes more enclosed against the rock face. The storm continues with heavy rain and fog maintaining the low visibility atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a stormy mountainside trail that gradually becomes more enclosed against a towering rock face. It begins by moving forward through a dark wilderness, where heavy rain and dense fog obscure the distance beyond the grassy path and scrub vegetation. As the camera advances, the open terrain on the left falls away, shifting the focus toward the imposing cliff wall on the right. The scene then tightens as the path narrows, drawing the viewer closer to the stone surface until the rock wall dominates the frame. This progression maintains a tense, low-visibility atmosphere as the storm persists throughout the movement.
